title: Replace photo URL inputs with JPEG file upload inputs for property photos

requirements.summary: Replace photo URL text inputs with JPEG file upload input in PostPropertyPage
acceptanceCriteria: No photo URL text input fields exist in PostPropertyPage
A file input with accept='image/jpeg,image/jpg' is present in the Features & Photos step
Multiple JPEG files can be selected at once
Thumbnail previews of selected photos are shown before submission
Selected photo data is submitted with the property form data

file_operations.description: In the Features & Photos step (step 2), remove all photo URL text input fields and their state management. Replace with a file input that accepts JPEG/JPG files (accept='image/jpeg,image/jpg') with multiple selection enabled. Add state to track selected File objects. Implement FileReader logic to convert selected files to ExternalBlob instances using ExternalBlob.fromBytes(). Display thumbnail previews of selected images using object URLs or the ExternalBlob.getDirectURL() method. Update the form submission logic to pass the ExternalBlob array to the images field instead of URL strings in the photos field. Verify the blob-storage component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Replace photo URL inputs with JPEG file upload in EditPropertyPage
acceptanceCriteria: No photo URL text input fields exist in EditPropertyPage
A JPEG file upload input is present
Existing property photos are shown as thumbnails when the edit form loads
New JPEG files can be selected and previewed before saving
Updated photo data is submitted correctly on form save

file_operations.description: Remove all photo URL text input fields. Add a JPEG file input (accept='image/jpeg,image/jpg') with multiple selection. Pre-populate the photo preview area by converting existing property.images ExternalBlob instances to display URLs using getDirectURL(). Add state to track newly selected File objects separately from existing images. Implement FileReader to convert new uploads to ExternalBlob instances. Display thumbnail previews for both existing and newly selected photos with remove buttons. On form submission, combine existing ExternalBlob instances (not removed) with newly uploaded ExternalBlob instances and pass them to the images field. Verify the blob-storage component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Update property display components to render JPEG photos from blob data
acceptanceCriteria: PropertyCard renders uploaded JPEG photos correctly using blob/base64 data
ImageGallerySlider on PropertyDetailPage renders all uploaded JPEG photos
No broken image icons appear for properties with uploaded photos
Properties without any photos show a fallback placeholder image

file_operations.description: Update the component to render property photos from the images field (ExternalBlob[]) instead of the photos field (Text[]). For the primary property image, use property.images[0]?.getDirectURL() if available, otherwise fall back to a placeholder image. Ensure the image src attribute uses the direct URL for browser caching and streaming.

Update the component to accept and render ExternalBlob[] instead of URL strings. Map over the images array and call getDirectURL() on each ExternalBlob instance to generate src URLs for the main gallery images and thumbnails. Ensure backward compatibility by showing a placeholder image if the images array is empty.
Update the ImageGallerySlider integration to pass property.images (ExternalBlob[]) instead of property.photos (Text[]). Ensure the component correctly handles the new blob-based image format.
Verify PropertyCard receives the full property object including the images field. No changes needed if PropertyCard is already receiving the complete property data.
Verify PropertyCard receives the full property object including the images field. No changes needed if PropertyCard is already receiving the complete property data.

Update property image rendering to use property.images[0]?.getDirectURL() instead of property.photos[0] for the luxury property cards. Add a fallback to the luxury-interior asset if no images exist: frontend/public/assets/generated/luxury-interior.dim_800x600.png.
Update property image rendering to use property.images[0]?.getDirectURL() instead of property.photos[0] for under-construction property cards. Add a fallback placeholder image if no images exist.
Update property thumbnail rendering in the user's property list to use property.images[0]?.getDirectURL() instead of property.photos[0]. Add a fallback placeholder for properties without images.
Update property thumbnail rendering in the admin listings table to use property.images[0]?.getDirectURL() instead of property.photos[0]. Add a fallback placeholder for properties without images.
